per_outcome.operationalization: Percentage of survey respondents who strongly agree that AI streamlines curriculum development for quicker content production
Percentage of survey respondents who strongly agree that AI creates effective teaching materials and enhances student success
Percentage of survey respondents who strongly agree that AI accommodates diverse learning styles
Combined percentage of agree and strongly agree responses across all seven effectiveness categories; composite measure of general AI effectiveness perceptions
Combined agree/strongly agree percentage for AI effectiveness in creating materials, expediting curriculum, and integrating learning theories; mixes speed and quality
Percentage agreeing or strongly agreeing that chatbots and AI tutors enhance student interaction and support; measures engagement/support rather than output quality
Percentage of respondents citing ChatGPT as a valuable tool; measures tool preference/adoption rather than task performance
Percentage of respondents citing Anthropic Claude as a valuable tool; measures tool preference/adoption
Percentage of respondents citing Google Bard as a valuable tool; measures tool preference/adoption
